page_content:
SPAN480 Spanish for Business II (3 Credits)

Business Spanish terminology, vocabulary and practice. Emphasis on everyday spoken and written Spanish. Readings and discussions of international topics. Cross-cultural considerations relative to international business operations, including exporting and banking. Taught in Spanish. Prerequisite: Must have completed SPAN370.

Restriction: Sophomore standing or higher.

Credit Only Granted for. SPAN470 or SPAN480.
